description: After a 3-hour production incident, you need to prepare a dashboard that tells the incident story clearly for a post-incident review meeting. Create and save a Graphite dashboard named 'Post-Incident Review' containing exactly three graphs: 'Hourly Peak CPU' with targets aliasByNode(summarize(servers.ec2_instance_1.cpu.utilization, '1h', 'max'), 1), aliasByNode(summarize(servers.ec2_instance_2.cpu.utilization, '1h', 'max'), 1), and aliasByNode(summarize(servers.ec2_instance_3.cpu.cloudwatch_utilization, '1h', 'max'), 1); 'Gap-Filled Temperature' with target keepLastValue(servers.datacenter.machine_temperature, 5); and 'Request Rate Summary' with target alias(summarize(derivative(servers.load_balancer.requests.count), '30min', 'sum'), 'LB Requests per 30min').
